name: camofox-browser
description:
Headless browser automation server using Camoufox (Firefox-based) running on port 9377. Provides browser automation with anti-detection, accessible tree snapshots, click/type/scroll/navigate capabilities.

Aliases: @camofox, @browser-auto, browser.

Use Camofox-browser when you need to interact with web pages programmatically: navigate, extract content, fill forms, take snapshots. The server runs at http://localhost:9377 and supports session-based isolated browsing.

interface.longDescription: Camofox-browser is a headless browser automation server powered by Camoufox (Firefox-based with anti-detection). It provides tab-based browsing with accessibility tree snapshots, click/type/scroll/navigate APIs, and isolated sessions. Useful for web scraping, form automation, and testing without browser detection.
defaultPrompt: Open a webpage and summarize its content
Search Google for the latest news
